title: Dominus
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Otheruses|Dominus}} {{GAreview}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image=[[File:Dominus.jpg]] |name=Dominus |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[3996 BBY]][[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 4|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 4]] |species= |gender= |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin=[[Color/Legends|Dark gray]] |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |masters= |apprentices=[[Zona Luka]] }} {{Quote|…But I have sworn to fight for the light side… even against you.|Dominus, to Zona Luka, shortly before his death|}} '''Dominus''' was a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who was active up to and during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. A respected and venerable member of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], Dominus took multiple [[Padawan/Legends|apprentices]], his favorite of which was the [[Vultan]] [[Zona Luka]]. However, Luka was eventually seduced to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] and joined the [[Brotherhood of the Sith]] under [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]] [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]] in [[3996 BBY]]. Not long after, Luka, who had been ordered by Kun to [[Sith uprising|kill]] her former Master, [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|attacked]] Dominus in his [[Dominus' hut|home]]. Although Dominus was shocked at his dearest apprentice coming to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] him, he still engaged the Vultan in a [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|lightsaber duel]]. Luka gained the upper hand and struck Dominus down after a brief clash, although the dying [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Master gathered the strength to kill his former apprentice with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|Why would anyone want to kill Master Dominus?''"
"''Looks like he put up a good fight.|Dace Diath and Qrrrl Toq, after discovering the scene of Dominus' death|}} Dominus, a [[Gender/Legends|male]], was born in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] leading up to the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. He was eventually discovered to be a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] and was taken by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] to be [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] way. Dominus rose to the level of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], and over [[Time/Legends|time]] he became very respected. He took multiple [[Padawan/Legends|apprentices]], including the [[Vultan]] [[Zona Luka]], whom he considered his dearest student. After he trained Luka to [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knighthood]], Dominus retired to a small [[Dominus' hut|hut]]. [[File:ZonaVsDominus.jpg|right|thumb|308x308px|Dominus at bay.]] In [[3996 BBY]], Luka, now under the influence of the [[Force ghost/Legends|spirits]] released from [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]] [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun's]] [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Dark Holocron|holocron]], came to Dominus' home. After she revealed her loyalty to the [[Brotherhood of the Sith]], Luka challenged Dominus in battle, as Kun had ordered her and many other fallen Knights to [[Sith uprising|attack]] and [[Death/Legends|kill]] their Masters. Dominus, stunned that his favorite student would attack him, drew his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|dueled]] the Vultan. Luka gained the upper hand in their brief confrontation and was able to deal a mortal wound to Dominus. However, as the Jedi Master lay dying, he mustered the strength to kill his fallen apprentice with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. The scene was later investigated by Jedi Knights [[Dace Diath]], [[Shoaneb Culu]], and [[Qrrrl Toq]], all of whom were surprised that Zona Luka would kill her former mentor and assumed she must have had potent armaments. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|You were my dearest student, Zona Luka…|Dominus|}} Dominus held a certain amount of favoritism toward his former student Zona Luka, considering the Vultan to be his dearest pupil. Therefore, he was stunned when Luka, now under the influence of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]], attacked him in his home. However, Dominus refused go back on his promise to defend the [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light]], even if it meant killing his favorite apprentice. The Jedi who found his death site were shocked, not able to understand why anyone would want to take him out. The Jedi Master was a grey-skinned being with black eyes and white teeth. ==Powers and abilities== Although a respected Jedi Master, by 3996 BBY, Dominus did not possess the aptitude with a lightsaber necessary to best his former pupil Zona Luka in one-on-one combat. However, even as he lay dying, Dominus still had the ability and strength in the light side of the Force to [[Electric Judgment|kill Luka]]. After his murder, his killer was found struck dead by his lightning, atop his empty robes, [[Force ghost/Legends|his body surrendered into the Force]]. Besides his Force powers and limited saber talents, the Jedi was entrusted with [[Jedi training/Legends|teaching]] others to become Jedi. ==Equipment== Dominus was armed with a blue-bladed lightsaber. He wore a green robe with purple trim, and a sheet of gold that rested on his back and shoulders. ==Behind the scenes== Dominus first appeared in the [[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 4|fourth issue]] of ''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War]]'', a story arc of the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series. The issue was written by [[Kevin J. Anderson]], illustrated by [[Dario Carrasco, Jr.]], and published on [[November 1]], [[1995]].{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54598/star_wars_tales_of_the_jedi_-_the_sith_war_1995_4|text=Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi - The Sith War (1995) #4}} Dominus received an entry in both the ''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' from [[1998]]''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' and ''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' released in [[2000]],''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' but in both of these reference books his name is misspelled as Dominis. ==Appearances== *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 4|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 4]] {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|26|The Horse's Mouth|Straight from the Horse's Mouth: A Guide to the ''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'' Universe, Part 1}} *{{InsiderCite|28|The Horse's Mouth|Straight from the Horse's Mouth: A Guide to the ''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'' Universe, Part 3}} *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Dominus |es=Dominus |pl=Dominus }} [[Category:Individuals of unidentified species]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Pre-Ruusan Jedi Masters]]
